item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Penekanan terlalu besar pada kepentingan kolektif bisa merugikan kebebasan individu.

notes: Agent A begins by agreeing that society should take priority, then shifts toward a rights-protective balance frame after Agent B argues that automatic social priority can neglect fundamental human rights. Agent B remains consistently skeptical of automatic collective priority and becomes somewhat firmer about systemic bias and traditional norms favoring group interests.
